Weighted Grade Calculator

Preview the calculator below, then copy or download the Brightspace-ready HTML.

Preview

Exam Timer

Set to 1 hour 15 minutes

01:15:00

Tip: Use Restart to reset back to 01:15:00.

Find code line: const INITIAL_MS = (1 * 60 * 60 + 15 * 60 ) * 1000;

Adjust the numbers for hours and minutes as needed, using the formula:

  • (# * 60 ) = minutes
  • (# * 60 * 60) = hours
  • (# * 60 * 60 + # * 60) = hours & minutes
